objective: Drive measurable ticket sales through cinematic content that creates FOMO and emotional urgency

executive_summary.problem: Current marketing is generic and not driving conversions. Exhibitions have immersive, once-in-a-lifetime experiences but content doesn't convey emotional weight or urgency to buy tickets.
executive_summary.opportunity: Exhibition marketing campaigns with cinematic, platform-optimized content average 2.5-4x ROAS in the experience industry. Strategic content that captures spectacle and emotional intensity can drive 20-40% ticket sales lifts within 60 days.
executive_summary.solution: Cinematic, platform-optimized content campaign (video + carousel ads) designed specifically to convert viewers to ticket buyers.
executive_summary.expected_impact: 20-30% increase in ticket sales from paid marketing channels within 60 days

campaign_strategy.core_insight: People don't hesitate on logistics — they hesitate on emotional commitment. If we can make people FEEL what they'll experience, they'll buy immediately.

content_pillars.immersion: Show the environment with cinematic detail — make viewers feel transported
content_pillars.emotion: Capture reactions, awe, wonder — create mirror neurons for experience
content_pillars.experience: Show specific moments they'll live — interactive elements, photo ops, sensory moments
content_pillars.urgency: Limited time, limited capacity, exclusive — force buying decision NOW

tiktok_instagram_reels.content: Scroll-stopping moments, crowd reactions, magic/wonder shots

instagram_facebook.content: Experience highlight → emotional moment → detail shot → social proof → CTA with pricing

google_ads.keywords: Harry Potter exhibition [city], Titanic experience, immersive exhibitions

content.video_production: Professional editing, color grading, music, voiceover guidance
content.carousel_ads: 4 per exhibition (different variations for A/B testing)
content.ad_copy_variants: 6 versions per ad (headline + body + CTA variations)

deliverables: 20 social media posts per exhibition (ready to post)
4 carousel ad templates per exhibition (5-image sequences)
Content calendar with posting schedule + platform specs
Ad copy testing framework (6 variants each)
Production brief with music, voiceover, color grading specs

metrics_framework.reporting: Weekly dashboard showing all above metrics + trend analysis

pilot_package.name: Pilot Program (30 days)
includes: Content strategy & creative brief for 1 exhibition
pilot_package.timeline: Start to finish: 14 days content production + 16 days campaigns live

growth_package.name: Growth Program (3 months)
includes: Both exhibitions (Harry Potter + Titanic) full strategies

premium_package.name: Premium + Video Production (3 months)
includes: Quarterly business review with ROI analysis

success_metrics.minimum_success: Cost per ticket acquired < 15% of ticket price
success_metrics.strong_success: Cost per ticket acquired < 10% of ticket price + 3:1 ROAS
success_metrics.exceptional_success: Cost per ticket acquired < 5% + sell-out status + organic word-of-mouth lift

timeline.week_1: Strategy finalization + content briefs + first batch video production
timeline.week_2: Video editing + carousel ad design + social media content creation
timeline.week_3: Ad copy testing variants + platform setup + audience targeting configuration
timeline.week_4: Campaign launch + daily optimization + performance monitoring
timeline.weeks_5_12: Ongoing optimization, A/B testing, performance analysis, creative refresh

investment_justification.cost_per_ticket_example: If Pilot = $2,500 and generates 50 tickets @ $45 avg = $2,250 revenue in first month
investment_justification.growth_example: If Growth = $9,500/mo and generates 150 tickets = $6,750 revenue + 30% margin/profit
investment_justification.scale_example: If Premium = $15K and generates 250+ tickets = $11K+ revenue + higher margin
investment_justification.key_point: This investment should generate 2-5x return within first 60 days if strategy is sound

why_auros.cinema_first: Our content isn't about promoting The Imagine Team — it's about selling the EXPERIENCE. Cinematic production, emotional storytelling, FOMO psychology.
why_auros.data_driven: Every piece of content is tied to a conversion metric. We measure impact by tickets sold, not vanity metrics.
why_auros.execution: We handle everything: strategy, creative production, platform optimization, reporting. You focus on operations.
why_auros.results_focused: Our success is measured by your ticket sales data. Every campaign decision is driven by conversion metrics, not creative preference.
